metadata.description: Frankencoin is a collateral-backed stablecoin pegged to the Swiss Franc (CHF). Users deposit collateral (WBTC, wstETH, LsETH, cbBTC, and others) into positions via the MintingHub to mint ZCHF, while the Equity token (FPS) represents governance rights and a share of the protocol's reserve pool. All core protocol contracts are immutable, with governance limited to FPS holders who can propose changes to Savings parameters. The protocol bridges to other CHF stablecoins (XCHF, VCHF) via immutable StablecoinBridge contracts and supports cross-chain transfers through Chainlink CCIP infrastructure. Total ZCHF market cap is $25.39M, with $65.90M in active collateral positions.

admins.name: MintingHub (Legacy)
admins.description: Immutable protocol contract registered as an active minter on the Frankencoin token. Can call registerPosition, collectProfits, coverLoss, and burnWithoutReserve directly. Positions created through it can call mintWithReserve, burnFrom, burnWithReserve, and burnFromWithReserve. This is the older MintingHub, no longer actively used but still registered as a minter with $0 in remaining positions.

admins.name: StablecoinBridge (XCHF)
admins.description: Immutable bridge contract enabling 1:1 conversion between XCHF (CryptoFranc) and ZCHF. Registered as an active minter but already expired (horizon passed ~2024-10-27), so no further minting is possible. Has an immutable minting limit of 10,000,000 ZCHF. The bridge holds XCHF as backing.

admins.name: MintingHub (Current)
admins.description: Immutable protocol contract and the primary entry point for creating collateral-backed positions. Registered as an active minter, it manages $65.90M across 51 active positions. Functions including openPosition, clone, challenge, bid, and buyExpiredCollateral are open to anyone. Positions created through it can call mintWithReserve, burnFrom, burnWithReserve, and burnFromWithReserve on the Frankencoin token.

admins.name: StablecoinBridge (VCHF)
admins.description: Immutable bridge contract that allows 1:1 conversion between VCHF (VNX Franc) and ZCHF. Registered as an active minter, it can mint and burn ZCHF. Has an immutable minting limit of 2,000,000 ZCHF and expires at a fixed horizon timestamp (~2026-04-15). The bridge holds VCHF as backing for ZCHF minted through it.

admins.name: Zero Address (Renounced)
admins.description: The zero address holds the newOwner role on CryptoFranc (acceptOwnership) and the migrationFromContract reference (migrateFrom). These permissions are effectively renounced and cannot be exercised.

admins.name: Equity (FPS Token)
admins.description: The Frankencoin governance token contract. FPS holders who meet qualification criteria can propose changes to Savings parameters via proposeChange. The Equity contract itself has kamikaze (self-sacrifice of shares for voting power) and restructureCapTable (emergency cap table wipe when equity falls below 1000 ZCHF). Holds $14.29M in reserves.

mitigations.description: Caller must sacrifice their own votes proportionally — budget deducted from caller first, then applied to targets up to that budget
Only callable when system equity < MINIMUM_EQUITY (1000 ZCHF) — system must be near-insolvent
Caller must be qualified FPS holder with 2% quorum of total votes (via checkQualified with helpers)

dependencies.name: VNXCToken (VCHF)
dependencies.description: VNX Franc stablecoin, an upgradeable ERC-20 (EIP-1967 proxy) used by the StablecoinBridge for 1:1 VCHF-to-ZCHF conversion. The VCHF token can be paused, frozen per-address, or upgraded by VNX, which would block StablecoinBridge mint/burn operations. Critical dependency for the VCHF bridge path.

dependencies.name: Chainlink RBACTimelock
dependencies.description: Chainlink-operated timelock (3h delay) that owns the ARMProxy and CryptoFranc contracts. Chainlink can modify CCIP configuration and CryptoFranc parameters after the timelock delay. Uses role-based access with PROPOSER, EXECUTOR, CANCELLER, and BYPASSER roles.

dependencies.name: VNX Proxy Admin
dependencies.description: Proxy admin for the VCHF token, controlled by an EOA (0x7B0C...9403). Can upgrade the VCHF token implementation without a timelock, which would directly affect the VCHF StablecoinBridge.

dependencies.name: CryptoFranc (XCHF)
dependencies.description: CryptoFranc token used by the StablecoinBridge for 1:1 XCHF-to-ZCHF conversion. XCHF is an immutable token but has centralized controls: it can be paused, its minter and operator can be changed, and token migrations can be initiated. Owned by a Chainlink RBACTimelock (3h delay), with minting controlled by a 3/6 XCHF multisig.

mitigations.description: Burns ZCHF to release equivalent XCHF to user; bounded by bridge's minted balance
mitigations.label: Burn Limit

dependencies.description: Chainlink Active Risk Management proxy used by the CCIP infrastructure (BurnMintTokenPool, BridgeAccounting) for cross-chain ZCHF transfer validation. Owned by the Chainlink RBACTimelock.

dependencies.name: XCHF Owner 3/4 Multisig
dependencies.description: A 3-of-4 GnosisSafe multisig that owns the CryptoFranc token through the Chainlink RBACTimelock. Controls CryptoFranc ownership transfer, operator assignment, migration, pause/unpause, and minter role changes.

dependencies.name: XCHF Minter 3/6 Multisig
dependencies.description: A 3-of-6 GnosisSafe multisig with the minter role on CryptoFranc. Can mint new XCHF tokens, which could be bridged to ZCHF via the StablecoinBridge.

dependencies.name: XCHF Operator 3/6 Multisig
dependencies.description: A 3-of-6 GnosisSafe multisig with the operator role on CryptoFranc. Can announce rollovers and refund foreign tokens.

dependencies.name: Chainlink TransferReference
dependencies.description: Chainlink CCIP infrastructure contract that facilitates cross-chain ZCHF transfers via transferFrom and approve. Registered as an active minter on the Frankencoin token but does not directly call mint or burn.

dependencies.name: Chainlink RBACTimelock (RMNRemote)
dependencies.description: A second Chainlink RBACTimelock (3h delay) that owns the RMNRemote contract. Controls RMNRemote configuration, curse/uncurse operations, and ownership transfer.

funds.name: Frankencoin (ZCHF Token)
funds.description: The ZCHF stablecoin token contract itself with a market cap of $25.39M. ZCHF is pegged to the Swiss Franc and backed by collateral locked in MintingHub positions, XCHF/VCHF reserves in StablecoinBridges, and the Equity reserve pool.

funds.name: Equity (FPS Reserve Pool)
funds.description: The FPS governance token contract that also serves as the protocol's reserve pool. Holds $14.29M primarily in ZCHF, representing the system's equity buffer that absorbs losses from undercollateralized liquidations.

funds.name: MintingHub (Current Positions)
funds.description: The active MintingHub managing 51 collateral positions worth $65.90M in aggregate. Positions are backed by WBTC, cbBTC, wstETH, LsETH, BOSS, PAXG, XAUt, WETH, GNO, CRV, and other collateral types.

funds.name: Savings (Current)
funds.description: The current Savings contract holding $9.62M in ZCHF deposits. Users deposit ZCHF to earn interest, which is minted by the contract as an active minter.

funds.name: StablecoinBridge (VCHF)
funds.description: Bridge contract holding $494.18K in VCHF reserves. These reserves back ZCHF minted through the VCHF-to-ZCHF bridge path. Has an immutable minting limit of 2,000,000 ZCHF and expires ~2026-04-15.

funds.name: StablecoinBridge (XCHF)
funds.description: Expired bridge contract holding $0 in XCHF reserves. The bridge expired ~2024-10-27, so no further minting is possible.

funds.name: MintingHub (Legacy Positions)
funds.description: The older MintingHub with $0 in 2 remaining WBTC collateral positions. No longer used for new position creation.

funds.name: Savings (Legacy)
funds.description: The older Savings contract holding $21.22K in remaining ZCHF deposits.

codeAndAudits.description: Smart contract analysis and audit history
